REDIS_URL.description: Redis connection string for caching, rate limiting, and idempotency. Required in production; also required in staging when EXTERNAL_AUDIT_IMPORT_ENABLED=true. Must not be localhost in those environments.

CELERY_BROKER_URL.description: Celery broker URL (typically Redis). Required in production; also required in staging when EXTERNAL_AUDIT_IMPORT_ENABLED=true. No silent localhost default in those environments.

CELERY_RESULT_BACKEND.description: Celery result backend URL. Required in production (and staging with imports); typically a Redis DB index distinct from the broker.

SECRET_KEY.description: Application secret key for JWT signing

CORS_ORIGINS.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins

RATE_LIMIT_PER_MINUTE.description: API rate limit per minute per user

DATA_RETENTION_DAYS.description: Default data retention period in days
